titleStmt.title: SII 9.182: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 182. (A.R. No. 104-A of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP INSIDE THE MALE-MALLAPPA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated in the 8 th year of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vijaya-Pāṇḍyadēva Vikṛita, Mārgaśira, ba. 5, Ādivāra Uttarāyaṇa-Saṅkrānti, Vyatīpāta, corresponding probably to A.D. 1110 December 3 Saturday (not Sunday) Uttarāyaṇa-sankrāṅti falling on the 25th of the month. The Sēnabōva Saṅkaṇa is stated to have made a gift of 40 kammas of garden land for the service of god Nīlēśvara, after washing the feet of [Nā]garāśi-Paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vijayapāṇḍyadēvara 8 neya vikritasaṁvatsa
rada mārggaśira bahuḷa 5 Ādivāradaṁdu Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpātaṁ kūḍalu
śrīmadayvadaṁbara priyaputranappa sēnabōva saṁkaṇa śrīmaddivyaliṁgaṁ nīlēśva
radēvaraṁgabhōganivēdyakaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ śrīmadayvadiṁbara sannidhānadoḷu
rāsipaṁḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa hosavasugeya
vina mūḍala tōṁṭa kamma 40 samastavastuguṇasaṁpa
sēnabōva honnabācayyaśrihonnadēviya
naivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ biṭṭa hannāsi
mattaru 1 kamma 100 koḍagada dēvanu Three more lines are effaced.
Digital edition of SII 9.182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
